CONTENT.Club career: In 2016 Petrić joined Ligue 1 club Angers.

CONTENT.International career: Petrić was born and raised in Slovenia, and played for their youth teams before switching to the Serbia U21 team. He has not made a senior appearance, and is eligible for either the Slovenian or Serbian national teams.

SUMMARY: Denis Petrić (Serbian Cyrillic: Денис Петрић, pronounced [dêːnis pěːtritɕ]; born 24 May 1988) is a  professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Nantes in France.
